scene_prompt: 请帮我去除这张图片中的噪点

candidates.name: Non-local Means Denoising
candidates.description: A non-local algorithm that averages similar patches across the image to reduce noise while preserving textures.
candidates.rationale: Effective for Gaussian noise removal by exploiting self-similarity in images; balances performance and detail preservation.

candidates.name: Bilateral Filter
candidates.description: A edge-preserving smoothing filter that combines domain and range kernels to reduce noise.
candidates.rationale: Good for preserving edges while smoothing noise; suitable for images with clear structural details.

candidates.name: Fast Non-local Means Denoising (OpenCV)
candidates.description: An optimized version of non-local means using approximation techniques for faster execution.
candidates.rationale: Provides near-similar quality to standard non-local means with significantly reduced computation time.

candidates.name: Gaussian Blur
candidates.description: A linear filter that convolves the image with a Gaussian kernel to smooth noise.
candidates.rationale: Simple and fast; effective for reducing high-frequency noise but may blur edges.

summary: Given the task of removing noise without significant loss of detail, Fast Non-local Means Denoising offers a strong balance of effectiveness and efficiency. It leverages patch-based similarity with optimized computation, making it suitable for general-purpose noise removal.
